hero.role: Full Stack Developer specialized in creating modern and functional web experiences

about.title: About Me
about.description_1: Software developer with a background from UADE and hands-on experience in web development. I build efficient, scalable, and well-structured applications.
about.description_2: Experienced in both frontend and backend development, with a focus on delivering full-stack solutions. Familiar with modern web technologies, database systems, and version control using Git. Strong foundation in software development principles, including object-oriented programming and design patterns. Fast learner, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in collaborative, team-driven environments.
